---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for an Analyse addon (new addon, new tracked event, etc.)
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that the addons don't let you do today? Describe the real-world situation, not a proposed implementation.

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? A new addon for a specific plugin, an additional tracked event, a new config option, etc.

## Alternatives you considered

Other ways this problem could be solved, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Anything else

Links, mockups, examples from other plugins, or related issues.
